item.title: Draft: New Public Meeting Portal Launched: Longmont City Council and advisory board agendas are now published on a new public meeting portal, making it easier for residents to access information about upcoming meetings.
item.description: Draft: New Public Meeting Portal Launched: Longmont City Council and advisory board agendas are now published on a new public meeting portal, making it easier for residents to access information about upcoming meetings.

item.title: Draft: Youth Center Programs in Longmont: The city is committed to supporting youth development through the Youth Center, which provides resources and activities for families and children.
item.description: Draft: Youth Center Programs in Longmont: The city is committed to supporting youth development through the Youth Center, which provides resources and activities for families and children.

item.title: Draft: Vision Zero Safety Projects: The city is actively working on Vision Zero projects to improve transportation safety, engaging citizens and stakeholders in these initiatives.
item.description: Draft: Vision Zero Safety Projects: The city is actively working on Vision Zero projects to improve transportation safety, engaging citizens and stakeholders in these initiatives.

item.title: Draft: Sustainable Business Program: The city offers a Sustainable Business Program to promote environmental stewardship, economic vitality, and social equity among local businesses.
item.description: Draft: Sustainable Business Program: The city offers a Sustainable Business Program to promote environmental stewardship, economic vitality, and social equity among local businesses.

item.title: Draft: Longmont Invites Applications for Official City Flag Design: The City of Longmont is seeking public input through an application process aimed at designing a new official city flag, fostering community engagement and pride.
item.description: Draft: Longmont Invites Applications for Official City Flag Design: The City of Longmont is seeking public input through an application process aimed at designing a new official city flag, fostering community engagement and pride.

item.title: Draft: City Council Meetings and Public Engagement: Residents can have their voices heard at the Public Invited to be Heard segment of City Council meetings, where staff often prepares ordinances based on citizen input. [tester edit]
item.description: Draft: City Council Meetings and Public Engagement: Residents can have their voices heard at the Public Invited to be Heard segment of City Council meetings, where staff often prepares ordinances based on citizen input. [tester edit]
